name: deckify
description: deckify — turn any brand's website into a complete Design System and a verified HTML slide deck. Built for AI agents, exported as living HTML.

plugins.name: deckify
plugins.description: Stop making slides. Let AI build them in HTML — the medium it was born to write in. Give deckify any brand URL; in minutes you get a brand-faithful Design System markdown plus a verified 9-slide HTML demo deck. Trigger: "use deckify on https://...", "build a deck like <brand>", "extract the design system from <site>".
